mano_cua.result_summary: Frappe framework app requires Python bench + MariaDB + Redis. Cannot deploy as standalone frontend. Additionally, repo clone (100MB) repeatedly timed out or corrupted across 5 attempts (proxy/direct/depth1/blob-filter).

deploy_notes.failure_reason: Frappe framework backend dependency (Python+MariaDB+Redis). Repo clone also failed repeatedly (100MB, timeout/corruption).
